evidence_statements.faithful_clinical_statement: Explain that symptoms associated with menopause may vary from minor to severe and be experienced over short or long time periods. As well as changes in menstrual cycle, symptoms may include: vasomotor symptoms (hot flushes and sweats) genitourinary symptoms (for example, vaginal dryness) effects on mood (for example, depressive symptoms ) musculoskeletal symptoms (for example, joint and muscle pain) sexual difficulties (for example, low sexual desire). [2015]
